title: The Lion And The Unicorn
content:
The Lion And The Unicorn.


                    The Lion and the Unicorn
                        Were fighting for the Crown;
                    The Lion beat the Unicorn
                        All round about the town.





                    Some gave them white bread,
                        And some gave them brown;
                    Some gave them plum-cake,
                        And sent them out of town.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Leonard Leslie Brooke, titled "The Lion And The Unicorn", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
